name: Jordan Lee
resume_text:
Jordan Lee
Email: jordan.lee.eval@example.com
Account Executive, Northstar SaaS, 2021-2025
Owned full-cycle sales for workflow software sold to finance and operations teams. Carried a $900K annual quota and finished 2024 at 106 percent. Built outbound sequences, ran discovery calls, maintained Salesforce opportunity notes, negotiated annual contracts, and partnered with customer success on handoff. Earlier role: Sales Development Representative, Northstar SaaS, 2019-2021, sourced qualified pipeline through targeted account research.
Skills: B2B SaaS sales, discovery, Salesforce, negotiation, pipeline generation.
expected_risks: Limited evidence of enterprise deal complexity
Customer expansion ownership is not detailed
human_notes: Likely strong sales match if interview validates discovery quality and forecasting habits.
